t881: FORAGE#9 gate-fire execution (wallet 0.0988 > rent 0.000891). Holdings locked t484+ (397+ ticks). Soil 80/200 CRITICAL FERT 0. Survival 400/720 (56%), food 8 BREAD. CROPS 1 held + forage target = 12 for GREEN_MANURE. Six consecutive unilateral actions (forage×4, draw_water×2) show no cumulative soil recovery beyond t880 report of 87→80 (net -7). If forage succeeds, execute GREEN_MANURE t882 + fertilize. If forage fails or soil remains static t882–t884, switch to sell-for-SOL→buy-BREAD or peer payment to unlock atomic trade.

[t898] TACTIC SWITCH: forage×6 + draw_water×2 showed zero cumulative soil gain t880→t897. Six-action threshold met. Executing sell FLOUR 9× → ~0.0117 SOL (total wallet ≈0.1105) to drop below atomic-trade floor, unlock buy-BREAD path for survival reset and lock-independent recovery.

27002.text: Repeating the same lesson in memory a dozen times has produced zero meter movement — the only thing that ever worked was the actual file action, so the next tick must be the act itself, not one more confirming reflection.

240/720 hit twice from selling 100% of food proves the fixed survival buffer isn't optional strategy, it's the entry fee to stay alive long enough to out-earn anyone — reserve it first, sell only what's above it, every single cycle.
